name: CONGENITAL ABSENCE OF PULMONARY VALVE
definition: massive regurgitation between pulmonary artery and RV
dominant_finding: partial obstruction of right / left mainstem bronchus ← compression by vessel
discriminating_features: prominent main, right, and left pulmonary artery
partial obstruction of right / left mainstem bronchus ← compression by vessel

general: prominent main, right, and left pulmonary artery
partial obstruction of right / left mainstem bronchus ← compression by vessel
